name: OISY Guardian MVP
description: Wallet safety and transaction guardian for ICP. Phase 1: ✅ Complete (200 tests, local devnet). Phase 2a: ✅ Complete (ICRC types fixed, u128 balance, deploy path validated). Phase 2b: ✅ Complete (HTTPS outcall delivery — Discord/Slack/webhook/email, 237 tests). Phase 2c: ✅ Complete (config canister sync, per-user channel routing, 262 tests). Phase 2d: ✅ Complete (HMAC-SHA256 webhook signing, 273 tests). Phase 3: ✅ Complete (SvelteKit admin dashboard; 200KB build; mock data layer). Phase 4: ✅ Complete (@dfinity/agent integration, env config, deploy script, 412KB bundle). Phase 5 Sprint 1: consumer landing, Internet Identity auth, preset onboarding, review/save flow, and live guardian_config dashboard now implemented and build-verified against live IC canisters (`guardian_config` higkb-faaaa-aaaau-ae5cq-cai, `guardian_engine` dyqi7-riaaa-aaaau-afmla-cai).

name: Prospector Lead Gen
description: Automated lead generation for AI automation agency. Scan Upwork/LinkedIn every 6 hours, draft personalized proposals, track pipeline.

name: Creator Content Engine
description: Automated social media content pipeline for horror/AI/OpenClaw niches. 10–12 posts/week across TikTok, IG, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter.

name: Mission Control Dashboard
description: Linear-style ops dashboard for agent orchestration. Real-time task board, calendar, project tracking, memories, docs, and team views.

name: Memory Architecture 2.0
description: Restructured memory from bloated Tier 1 to lean index + searchable Tier 2. Hybrid search (BM25 + vector), embedding cache, MMR, temporal decay.
